mapper.insert: insert into dms_non_drug_item_record (registration_id, status, aim, demand, log_status, check_result, result_img_url_list, clinical_impression, clinical_diagnosis, create_time, excute_staff_id, log_datetime, no_drug_id, check_parts, type, excute_dept_id, create_staff_id, log_staff_id, excute_time, amount) values (#{registrationId}, #{status}, #{aim}, #{demand}, #{logStatus}, #{checkResult}, #{resultImgUrlList}, #{clinicalImpression}, #{clinicalDiagnosis}, #{createTime}, #{excuteStaffId}, #{logDatetime}, #{noDrugId}, #{checkParts}, #{type}, #{excuteDeptId}, #{createStaffId}, #{logStaffId}, #{excuteTime}, #{amount})
mapper.select: select COALESCE(sum(amount), 0) from dms_non_drug_item_record where registration_id = #{registrationId} and (status is null or status <> 2)

select r.id, r.registration_id as registrationId, r.type, r.status, r.demand, r.no_drug_id as noDrugId, r.check_result as checkResult, r.clinical_impression as clinicalImpression, r.clinical_diagnosis as clinicalDiagnosis, p.name as patientName, p.medical_record_no as medicalRecordNo, nd.name as projectName, dr.attendance_date as attendanceDate, sd.name as deptName from dms_non_drug_item_record r inner join dms_registration dr on r.registration_id = dr.id left join pms_patient p on dr.patient_id = p.id left join dms_non_drug nd on r.no_drug_id = nd.id left join sms_dept sd on dr.dept_id = sd.id where r.type in (1, 3) and (r.status is null or r.status <> 2)
and (r.status = 0 or r.status is null)
and r.status = 1
and (nd.dept_id is null or nd.dept_id = #{staffDeptId})
order by r.id desc

select r.id, r.registration_id as registrationId, r.type, r.status, r.demand, r.no_drug_id as noDrugId, r.check_result as checkResult, r.clinical_impression as clinicalImpression, r.clinical_diagnosis as clinicalDiagnosis, r.result_img_url_list as resultImgUrlList, p.name as patientName, p.medical_record_no as medicalRecordNo, COALESCE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.date_of_birth, dr.attendance_date), 0) as age, case when p.gender = 1 then '男' when p.gender = 0 then '女' else '—' end as genderStr, nd.name as projectName, dr.attendance_date as attendanceDate, sd.name as deptName, sc.name as orderDoctorName from dms_non_drug_item_record r inner join dms_registration dr on r.registration_id = dr.id left join pms_patient p on dr.patient_id = p.id left join dms_non_drug nd on r.no_drug_id = nd.id left join sms_dept sd on dr.dept_id = sd.id left join sms_staff sc on r.create_staff_id = sc.id where r.type in (1, 3) and (r.status is null or r.status <> 2)
and (p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.medical_record_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or nd.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and (nd.dept_id is null or nd.dept_id = #{staffDeptId})
order by r.id desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update dms_non_drug_item_record set status = 1, excute_staff_id = #{staffId}, excute_time = #{executeTime} where id = #{id} and (status = 0 or status is null) and type in (1, 3)

update dms_non_drug_item_record set check_result = #{checkResult}, clinical_impression = #{clinicalImpression}, clinical_diagnosis = #{clinicalDiagnosis}, log_staff_id = #{logStaffId}, log_datetime = #{logDatetime}, result_img_url_list = #{resultImgUrlList} where id = #{id} and status = 1 and type in (1, 3)
